mapper.select: SELECT id, name, description, chart_type, config_json, built_in, sort_order, created_by, created_at FROM bi_chart_template ORDER BY built_in DESC, sort_order ASC, id ASC
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO bi_chart_template (name, description, chart_type, config_json, built_in, sort_order, created_by) VALUES (#{name}, #{description}, #{chartType}, #{configJson}, #{builtIn}, #{sortOrder}, #{createdBy})
mapper.update: UPDATE bi_chart_template SET name = #{name}, description = #{description}, chart_type = #{chartType}, config_json = #{configJson}, built_in = #{builtIn}, sort_order = #{sortOrder}, created_by = #{createdBy} WHERE id = #{id}
